scripts.typecheck: pnpm gen && nuxt typecheck && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json
scripts.gate:drift: pnpm gen && (git diff --exit-code shared/routing.generated.ts || (echo '' && echo '✖ gate:drift: the GENERATED routing map is out of date — shared/routing.generated.ts differs from what is committed.' && echo '  → Fix: run `pnpm gen`, then commit the regenerated file in the SAME commit as your manifest edit.' && echo '  → Avoid it: never hand-edit shared/routing.generated.ts, and always regenerate + commit it alongside any tenant.config.ts change. (content.config.ts is dynamic now — no regen needed.)' && exit 1))
